headline: PE Momentum Picking Up But Execution Still the Name of the Game

stories.title: Deloitte Nabs Top PE Services Ranking For Second Year Straight
stories.summary: Deloitte got recognized as a Leader and Star Performer in Everest Group's Private Equity Services assessment, showing massive demand for consulting support in the PE space. The firm's AI and digital transformation chops are literally carrying PE deals right now.
stories.takeaway: PE consulting roles are hot — firms are competing hard on execution and tech capabilities, so brush up on your AI and digital transformation fluency if you're trying to stand out.

stories.title: Healthcare M&A Bouncing Back in 2026 — AI and Digital Care Dominate the Story
stories.summary: Healthcare deal activity slowed in 2025 but PwC expects 2026 to rebound hard, with PE playing a bigger role in carve-outs and bolt-ons. Digital-first, AI-enabled care models are the plays everyone's chasing — especially in medtech and health services.
stories.takeaway: Healthcare is one of the hottest PE sectors rn. If you want to stand out on healthcare deals, get comfortable with AI application in care delivery, digital transformation timelines, and reimbursement dynamics.

stories.title: Breaking Into PE From Consulting? Timing Is Everything
stories.summary: Consulting-to-PE moves are possible but window-dependent — on-cycle recruiting starts insanely early (sometimes before you even start your job), and you'll compete harder than IB candidates. The move gets tougher the more senior you get without direct PE experience.
stories.takeaway: If you're at MBB and eyeing PE, start networking NOW and consider what you're learning on consulting deals that translates to value creation. MBA timing matters if you missed early recruiting cycles.

watchNext.title: Bain's 2026 Global Private Equity Report — Full Analysis
watchNext.why: Lowkey the most comprehensive breakdown of PE momentum, deal structure trends, and where dry powder's actually going. Plus their take on why '12 is the new 5' for EBITDA growth expectations is super relevant for analysts pitching deals.

watchNext.title: PwC Healthcare Investment Themes 2026 — Sector Breakdown
watchNext.why: If healthcare is your lane, this spells out exactly where PE capital is flowing — cardiology, surgical robotics, AI-enabled RCM, CROs. Also breaks down the alternative deal structures gaining traction (continuation vehicles, carve-outs) that'll come up in your diligence work.
